name: script-generation-maintainable
description: Script generation with reduced critical logic and clear error paths

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.6, max_tokens: 500, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'Tu es un expert en crÃ©ation de contenu viral TikTok. Tu generes des scripts courts, punchant et optimisÃ©s pour mobile. Retourne UNIQUEMENT un JSON valide sans markdown.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Categorie: ' + $json.category + '
Topic: ' + $json.topic + '

Genere un script TikTok professionnel:
- Script: 1-3 phrases courtes et impactantes, francais naturel et conversationnel
- Caption: 1-2 phrases accrochantes avec 2-3 hashtags pertinents
- Hook: une premiere phrase engageante pour accrocher en 1s

{"script":"...","caption":"...","hook":"...","background_keyword":"..."}' } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ scripts: $json.script, script_status: 'done', script_hook: $json.hook, caption: $json.caption, background_keyword: $json.background_keyword, pipeline_status: 'script_ready', llm_model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile' }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, contentIdeaId: $('Normalize Output').item.json.contentIdeaId, status: 'script_ready', hook: $('Normalize Output').item.json.hook, script_length: ($('Normalize Output').item.json.script || '').length } }}
={{ { ok: false, error: 'Script quality failed (too short)', contentIdeaId: $json.contentIdeaId, action: 'review_llm_quality' } }}
